name: v02-peer-communication
title: Multi-Client Peer Communication v0.2
description: Design and implement star-topology peer communication. Add 6 new protocol message types. Update Host with peer routing and Client with peer API (sendToPeer, broadcast, onPeerMessage, onPeerChange, getPeers). Create Example 04 with full peer communication demo.
creator: ziyu

subtasks.name: Add 6 new protocol message types to shared
Add type guards for peer messages
Update Client: sendToPeer, broadcast, onPeerMessage, onPeerChange, getPeers
Create Example 04 with peer communication demo
Fix script escaping and cross-origin iframe issues

notes: Star topology: all peer messages routed through Host. Fire-and-forget delivery. Client must be connected to use peer methods.
